assertions.description: CSSOM keeps valid font-feature-settings descriptors attached to @font-face rules.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@font-face { font-family: t; src: local("Georgia"); font-feature-settings: "liga" 1, "smcp" 1; }');const r=s.cssRules[0];const v=r&&r.style&&r.style.fontFeatureSettings;return typeof CSSFontFaceRule==='function'&&r instanceof CSSFontFaceRule&&/liga/.test(v)&&/smcp/.test(v);}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: The descriptor accepts the normal keyword inside @font-face.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@font-face { font-family: t; src: local("Georgia"); font-feature-settings: normal; }');const r=s.cssRules[0];return r&&r.style&&r.style.fontFeatureSettings==='normal';}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: The descriptor normalizes an off feature value to its numeric disabled value.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@font-face { font-family: t; src: local("Georgia"); font-feature-settings: "liga" off; }');const r=s.cssRules[0];return r&&r.style&&r.style.fontFeatureSettings==='"liga" 0';}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: Malformed OpenType feature tags are rejected rather than retained on @font-face rules.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@font-face { font-family: t; src: local("Georgia"); font-feature-settings: "ligature" 1; }');const r=s.cssRules[0];return !!r&&!r.style.fontFeatureSettings&&!/font-feature-settings/.test(r.cssText);}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: CSSFontFaceRule is exposed as the CSSOM type backing @font-face descriptor rules.
A font-feature-settings descriptor can live on the font family while matching elements omit the element-level property.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@font-face { font-family: DescriptorOnly; src: local("Georgia"); font-feature-settings: "kern" 1; } .descriptor-only-probe { font-family: DescriptorOnly; }');const fontRule=s.cssRules[0];const styleRule=s.cssRules[1];return /kern/.test(fontRule.style.fontFeatureSettings)&&styleRule.style.fontFeatureSettings==='';}catch(e){return false;}})()
